prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG steampunk fantasy atlas map, first batch pass, landscape orientation
Primary request: Iron Kingdoms / Full Metal Fantasy inspired steampunk world map, diverse archipelago terrain type.
Scene/backdrop: overhead birds-eye atlas view of a vast stormy ocean filled with many industrial island groups, microcontinents, and mechanikal naval routes.
Subject: diverse archipelago layout with uneven island distribution across a broad ocean: several large industrial islands, microcontinents, tiny dockyard islets, curved island arcs, lagoons, reef belts, narrow straits, remote atolls, volcanic islands, fragmented rocky coasts, warjack foundry islands, fortress ports, alchemist quarantine islands, blighted marsh islands, coal mountain islands, forest islands, tundra islands, desert islands, and arcane storm islands.
Style/medium: Iron Kingdoms continent map, steampunk fantasy aesthetic, mechanikal detail overlay, aged industrial parchment, brass and blueprint cartography, highly detailed illustrated RPG sourcebook map.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 landscape, no single dominant mainland, island groups sweep in organic arcs and clusters, full archipelago visible with ocean border.
Lighting/mood: full metal fantasy, steam and magic intertwined, warjack smoke plumes, arcane lightning, naval warfare, industrial espionage and mercenary routes.
Color palette: aged brass, soot grey, copper, storm blue, arcane cyan, muted green forests, iron red foundries, parchment tan, coal black.
Materials/textures: stained parchment, brass-etched coastlines, blueprint overlays, riveted border details, hand-painted terrain, detailed waves and shoals.
Constraints: no text labels, no letters, no readable words, no legend, no compass text, no watermark, no UI, no characters or portraits. Avoid grid-like spacing and avoid identical island shapes.
